mapper.select: SELECT T.PST_CD, T.PST_NM, T.BRD_CD, T.THUMB_URL, T.VIEW_CNT, T.RGT_DTM, T.BRD_NM FROM ( SELECT A.PST_CD, A.PST_NM, A.BRD_CD, A.THUMB_URL, IFNULL(A.VIEW_CNT,0) AS VIEW_CNT, DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM,'%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM, B.BRD_NM, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.BRD_CD ORDER BY A.VIEW_CNT DESC, A.IDX DESC ) AS RN FROM TB_BBS_PST A INNER JOIN TB_BBS_BRD B ON A.BRD_CD = B.BRD_CD AND B.DEL_YN='N' AND B.USE_YN='Y' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N' AND A.PST_LVL = 0 AND A.BRD_CD IN (#{brdCdStra}, #{brdCdStre}, #{brdCdDise}, #{brdCdSafe}, #{brdCdSpfe}, #{brdCdTere}, #{brdCdVera}, #{brdCdSdse}) ) T WHERE T.RN <= 9

SELECT A.POP_CD , A.POP_NM , A.POP_CNTS , A.POP_WIDTH , A.POP_HGT , A.POP_X_LOC , A.POP_Y_LOC FROM TB_POP A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.MENU_SYS_DIV = 'F' AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') BETWEEN A.OPEN_START_DT AND A.OPEN_END_DT ORDER BY A.CRE_DTM DESC

SELECT NEWS_CD , NEWS_TITLE , NEWS_URL , CONCAT(SUBSTRING(RGT_DT,1,4),'.',SUBSTRING(RGT_DT,5,2),'.',SUBSTRING(RGT_DT,7,2)) AS RGT_DT FROM TB_NEWS WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY RGT_DT DESC LIMIT 5
